config_template.notes: Supports -1 inference for a single dim; operates on padded_shape, input must be on device (TILE_LAYOUT in tests). Total element count must be preserved.

applicability_notes: constraints: {'rank': 4, 'allows_negative_one_dim': True, 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT or ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT (tests use TILE_LAYOUT)', 'dtype_observed': ['bfloat16']}; fusion_notes: Frequently appears in transpose->reshape->transpose->reshape chains (e.g. space-to-depth style stride folding in conv preprocessing: reshape(n, w//stride_w, c*stride_w, h)). Candidate for fusing the whole chain into a single fold/space-to-depth op.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: 4D activation, NHWC-permuted conv preprocessing tensor (n, w//stride_w, c*stride_w, h)
placement_observations.source: test: transpose/reshape stride-folding chain uses memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG for both reshape_on_device calls
test: ttnn.transpose(..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) immediately before/after reshape_on_device
test: ttnn.Tensor(...).to(TILE_LAYOUT).to(device) default memory config, no explicit memory_config passed to reshape_on_device
